description: Distilled setup-failure cases used to keep SetupLens doctor rules tied to reproducible project failures. Public alpha.3 scan patterns are distilled into sanitized minimal fixtures after review.

source.label: CMMS validation on 2026-06-18

files.docker-compose.yml:
services:
  api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: infra/api/Dockerfile
  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    volumes:
      - ./infra/nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
files.Makefile:
format:
	cd apps/web && npm run format

source.label: Common Next.js + Prisma local clone missing .env

files.prisma/schema.prisma:
generator client { provider = "prisma-client-js" }
datasource db { provider = "postgresql" url = env("DATABASE_URL") }
